    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values

    F

    FieldTableView - Class in gui.board
    Represents the main playing field in the center of the game board.
    FieldTableView() - Constructor for class gui.board.FieldTableView
    Constructs the main game field area.
    Fighter - Enum constant in enum class NonGui.BaseEntity.Properties.UnitClass
    A balanced melee class capable of dealing consistent damage and taking hits.
    FinalSpark - Class in NonGui.ListOfCards.magiccard
    Represents the "Final Spark" Magic Card.
    FinalSpark() - Constructor for class NonGui.ListOfCards.magiccard.FinalSpark
    Constructs a new Final Spark card with its identity and effect text.
    Fiora - Class in NonGui.ListOfCards.herocard.Fighter
    Represents the "Fiora" Hero Card.
    Fiora() - Constructor for class NonGui.ListOfCards.herocard.Fighter.Fiora
    Constructs Fiora with her base stats and duelist flavor text.
    FlashFreeze - Class in NonGui.ListOfCards.modifiercard
    Represents the "Flash Freeze" Modifier Card.
    FlashFreeze() - Constructor for class NonGui.ListOfCards.modifiercard.FlashFreeze
    Constructs a new Flash Freeze card with its identity and modifier values.
    ForbiddenIdol - Class in NonGui.ListOfCards.itemcard.ChangeClass
    Represents the "Forbidden Idol" Item Card.
    ForbiddenIdol() - Constructor for class NonGui.ListOfCards.itemcard.ChangeClass.ForbiddenIdol
    Constructs a new Forbidden Idol with its identity, effect text, and target class.
    ForDemacia - Class in NonGui.ListOfCards.modifiercard
    Represents the "For Demacia" Modifier Card.
    ForDemacia() - Constructor for class NonGui.ListOfCards.modifiercard.ForDemacia
    Constructs a new For Demacia card with its identity and modifier values.
    FreljordianYeti - Class in NonGui.ListOfObjective
    Represents the "Freljordian Yeti" Objective Card.
    FreljordianYeti() - Constructor for class NonGui.ListOfObjective.FreljordianYeti
    Constructs a new Freljordian Yeti objective with its requirements and penalties.
    FrozenHeart - Class in NonGui.ListOfCards.itemcard.CurseItem
    Represents the "Frozen Heart" Item Card.
    FrozenHeart() - Constructor for class NonGui.ListOfCards.itemcard.CurseItem.FrozenHeart
    Constructs a new Frozen Heart with its identity and penalty effect text.
    FULL_H - Static variable in class gui.card.ImageCache
     
    FULL_LEADER_H - Static variable in class gui.card.ImageCache
     
    FULL_LEADER_W - Static variable in class gui.card.ImageCache
     
    FULL_W - Static variable in class gui.card.ImageCache
     
    FullCardView - Class in gui.card
    Provides a detailed, full-screen pop-up view for a single card.
    FullCardView(BaseCard) - Constructor for class gui.card.FullCardView
    Constructs a FullCardView for the specified card.
